title: New winners at golf club
description: GOLF NEWS - Graaff-Reinet Golf Club hosted...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - Graaff-Reinet Golf Club hosted its weekly competitions this past weekend.","html":"GOLF NEWS - Graaff-Reinet Golf Club hosted its weekly competitions this past weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"IPS","html":"IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["1st: Dan Yeadon 35","2nd: Niek Steyn 34","3rd: Andre Olivier 33"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Two Clubs competition was won by J Olivier.","html":"The Two Clubs competition was won by J Olivier."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundowner IPS","html":"Sundowner IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["1st: Derek Helm 20","2nd: Robert Hobson 20","3rd: Peter Moseley 18"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"IPS","html":"IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["A div: Jaco Venter 41","B div: Frikkie Coetzee 39","C div: Derek Helm 36"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
